title: dryopteris ruiziana
intro: Dryopteris ruiziana, also known as the Ruiz's wood fern, is a species of fern belonging to the Dryopteris genus. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris ruiziana include its potential to aid in reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
